text:
Myuhan (ミュハン, Myuhan) was one of 4 th Prince Tserriednich's bodyguards. He was one of the five personal guards that Tserriednich had successfully become a Provisional Hunter in order to bypass the normal fifteen employee limit, allowing Tserriednich to have twenty employees journey with him to the Dark Continent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 374 

Myuhan was one of the two representatives Tserriednich sent to attend Kurapika's first round of Nen classes, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 369 but died during the second lesson. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 376 

Appearance

Myuhan had short, prickly hair, small eyebrows, and a big nose. As a Royal Bodyguard, he wore a black suit and a tie. 

Personality

Myuhan seemed to take after the personality of his Prince, Tserriednich, when it came to cold-blooded murder. He tested his limitations with Kurapika during their Nen training by allegedly being unaware that he was going against the rules. Although he did promise that he was a man of his word, he admitted to losing his cool when others did not. He seemed loyal to Tserriednich, as when Kurapika blamed Tserriednich for his guard's actions, an enraged Myuhan attempted to assault Kurapika before being restrained by his colleague. Due to his character, he was despised by the others, and even the mysterious assassin would believe that he was dense. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 370 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Myuhan stands behind Theta as she informs 4 th Prince Tserriednich that all of his personal bodyguards have passed the 289 th Hunter Exam. 

On the first day of the voyage, Tserriednich is contacted by Room 1014 and agrees to send his bodyguards to learn Nen under Kurapika. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 368 At 9:00 a.m. the next day, Myuhan turns up at Room 1014 together with Danjin for the lessons. The two guards are ordered to kill all the participants if the two of them are unable to learn Nen within the promised two weeks. Myuhan snickers, excited at the chance to kill the other participants, but his thoughts are sensed by Danjin, who reminds him not to avoid learning Nen on purpose. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 369 

Kurapika begins his lesson by marking a line on the floor and letting the participants know not to cross it. Myuhan decides to test him and steps on the line, pretending not to be aware of what he is doing. Kurapika demands his name and affiliation, but he pretends not to have heard Kurapika, prompting Danjin to knock him and get him to answer. Myuhan plays the fool but answers Kurapika and receives a warning from him. Myuhan apologizes and promises not to cross it again, but antagonizes Kurapika and subtly asks if Kurapika is wasting their time. Kurapika does not get incited but retorts with an indirect comment about how his actions reflect on Tserreidnich, getting a reaction out of Myuhan, leading to him being restrained by Danjin and Danjin apologizing on his behalf. 

Kurapika segues from Danjin's outburst to having the participants introduce their names and affiliations. Midway through the participants' introductions, Barrigen, representative of 13 th Prince Marayam is suddenly attacked by a small pack of white snakes. Myuhan stands and watches, but Barrigen is killed before the participants can react. After a short discussion with Kurapika, the participants agree to continue the lessons, and they are sorted by how they clasp their hands with varying instructions to begin feeling Nen; Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 371 Myuhan continues with the "shaker" group's instructions until 12:30 p.m., the end of lessons that day. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 372 

The following day, Myuhan returns to Room 1014 to continue lessons. At 10:05 a.m., his exsanguinated corpse is discovered in the toilet, killed the same way as Barrigen the previous day. 

Abilities & Powers

As a Provisional Hunter, Myuhan had all the benefits granted by his status as a Hunter. However, these were all temporary, and his Hunter status and license would have expired after the voyage to the New Continent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 34, Chapter 358 He appeared to be very confident in his combat abilities since he looked forward to the possibility of killing everyone studying Nen under Kurapika, which Tserriednich seemingly believed him and Danjin to be capable of. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Although not one of Silent Majority's original ten targets, whose name and personality the user did not know, Myuhan is killed the following day by it. 
For Kurapika's Nen training, Myuhan is a "shaker".
